---
title: List of Default Agents
description: A list of out-of-the-box agents available in Agent Studio.
sidebar:
  order: 2
---

export const EXCLUDED_AGENT_PAGE_IDS = [
  'build/agents/overview',
  'build/agents/publishing-agents',
  'build/agents/default-agents',
];

import { getCollection } from 'astro:content';

export async function getAgentsList() {
  const agents = await getCollection('docs', (entry) => {
    if (!entry.id) return false;
    return entry.id.startsWith('build/agents') && !EXCLUDED_AGENT_PAGE_IDS.includes(entry.id);
  });
  
  return agents.sort((a, b) => a.data.title.localeCompare(b.data.title));
}

export const agents = await getAgentsList();

Alation provides out-of-the-box agents for common tasks: searching catalog objects, answering questions from dashboards and data products, generating charts, and more.
Each has a sensible default prompt and tool configuration, and all are available via MCP and REST.

Use them as-is, or clone one and adjust its prompt and tools when your use case needs more precision.

The following agents are available out-of-the-box:

<ul>
{agents.map(agent => (
  <li>
    <a href={`/agent-studio-docs/${agent.id}/`}>{agent.data.title}</a>
    {agent.data.description && ` - ${agent.data.description}`}
  </li>
))}
</ul>
